summary: Integrated ADR 0227 on top of repo release 0.177.45 by replaying `make converge-windmill` from the rebased merged-main candidate, re-verifying governed `systemd-run` execution for `network-impairment-matrix`, and proving that the bounded command envelope, repo-local secret staging, guest-local Windmill URL override, and execution-lane write contract all hold on the current production runtime.

verification.observed: `python3 scripts/command_catalog.py --validate`, `python3 scripts/agent_tool_registry.py --validate`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` all passed on the rebased candidate, and `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_controller_automation_toolkit.py tests/test_maintenance_window_tool.py tests/test_governed_command.py tests/test_governed_command_runtime.py tests/test_lv3_cli.py` returned `66 passed in 1.01s` after harmonizing the shared YAML fallback parser with the `platform.repo` refactor.

`make converge-windmill` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0227-live-apply` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=230 changed=41 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=63 changed=1 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin ok=36 changed=4 failed=0`.

verification.check: Governed command transient-unit replay from the integrated candidate
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/governed_command.py --command network-impairment-matrix --requester-class human_operator --approver-classes human_operator --preflight-passed --validation-passed --receipt-planned --param 'NETWORK_IMPAIRMENT_MATRIX_ARGS=target_class=staging --approve-risk'` returned `executed: true`, `returncode: 0`, unit `lv3-governed-network-impairment-matrix-9dbb73e9a6e9`, and receipt `/srv/proxmox_florin_server/.local/governed-command/receipts/lv3-governed-network-impairment-matrix-9dbb73e9a6e9.json`.

verification.check: Guest-local Windmill path and rendered report
verification.observed: The governed runtime receipt recorded `status: ok`, `started_at: 2026-03-28T18:47:08Z`, `finished_at: 2026-03-28T18:47:10Z`, and staged paths for the SSH key, Windmill superadmin secret, and NATS admin password. The stdout log showed `uv run --with pyyaml --with nats-py python /srv/proxmox_florin_server/scripts/lv3_cli.py run network-impairment-matrix --args target_class=staging --approve-risk` and the guest-local route `http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fnetwork-impairment-matrix`. `/srv/proxmox_florin_server/.local/network-impairment-matrix/latest.json` reported `status: planned`, `target_class: staging`, and `entry_count: 4`.

notes: The earlier branch-local live-apply receipt remains preserved as the first isolated-worktree replay, but this merged-main-equivalent receipt is the canonical source for the release and platform bump that follow from the rebased candidate.

The first branch replay required a one-time chmod repair on `/srv/proxmox_florin_server/.local/state/execution-lanes/registry.json` and `.lock`. The current merged-main-equivalent converge and replay proved that the repository contract now keeps those files writable at `0666` without a manual follow-up.

The integrated release step that follows this receipt updates `VERSION`, `RELEASE.md`, `changelog.md`, `docs/release-notes/*`, `README.md`, `build/platform-manifest.json`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and the workstream metadata to record ADR 0227 in repo version 0.177.46 and platform version 0.130.41.
